Ice Fishing by Evolution Gaming is not just another wheel game with a winter skin. It is a full live casino show built around speed, presentation, and the small suspense of pulling something unexpected from under the ice.

Ice Fishing na Evolution Gaming si mchezo mwingine wa wheel wenye ganda la baridi tu. Ni live casino show kamili iliyojengwa kwenye kasi, uwasilishaji, na mvutano mdogo wa kuvuta kitu kisichotarajiwa chini ya barafu.

Evolution introduced Ice Fishing at ICE 2025 in Barcelona, and the game immediately stood out because it did not look like another standard wheel release. The theme may overlap with Ice Fish from InOut Games, but the execution is completely different. InOut made a fast digital instant game. Evolution turned the idea into a live studio show with a host, a virtual wheel, short betting windows, and bonus scenes built around the fishing reveal.

Evolution ilizindua Ice Fishing katika ICE 2025 Barcelona, na mchezo ulijitokeza mara moja kwa sababu haukuonekana kama toleo lingine la kawaida la wheel. Mandhari inaweza kufanana na Ice Fish kutoka InOut Games, lakini utekelezaji ni tofauti kabisa. InOut iliunda mchezo wa papo hapo wa kidijitali wa haraka. Evolution iligeuza wazo kuwa live studio show yenye host, virtual wheel, betting window fupi, na mandhari za bonus zinazojengwa kwenye ufunuo wa uvuvi.

The concept fits the current direction of live casino products. Players want games that open quickly, explain themselves visually, and do not take several minutes per round. Evolution built Ice Fishing around that pace.

Dhana inafaa na mwelekeo wa sasa wa bidhaa za live casino. Wachezaji wanataka michezo inayofunguka haraka, inajieleza kwa kuona, na haichukui dakika kadhaa kwa kila raundi. Evolution ilijenga Ice Fishing kwenye kasi hiyo.
Each round lasts around 20 seconds, including an 8-second betting window, which makes the game one of the faster titles in the provider's live game-show lineup.

Kila raundi hudumu takriban sekunde 20, ikiwa ni pamoja na betting window ya sekunde 8, jambo linaloufanya mchezo kuwa mojawapo ya majina ya haraka zaidi katika orodha ya live game show ya mtoa huduma.

Ice Fishing is built around a virtual money wheel with instant payout sectors and three different Bonus games. The player places a bet before the round starts, the wheel spins, and the sector under the pointer decides what happens next.

Ice Fishing imejengwa kwenye virtual money wheel yenye sekta za malipo ya papo hapo na michezo mitatu tofauti ya Bonus. Mchezaji huweka dau kabla ya raundi kuanza, wheel inazunguka, na sekta chini ya pointer huamua kinachofuata.

If the wheel lands on Leaf 1 or Leaf 2, the result is settled immediately. If it lands on one of the fish bonus sectors — Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, or Huge Reds — the game moves into an Arctic fishing scene where the host tries to pull a fish from under the ice.

Ikiwa wheel itatua kwenye Leaf 1 au Leaf 2, matokeo hutatuliwa mara moja. Ikiwa itatua kwenye moja ya sekta za bonus za samaki — Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, au Huge Reds — mchezo huenda kwenye mandhari ya uvuvi ya Arctic ambapo host anajaribu kuvuta samaki chini ya barafu.

That is where the game gets its personality. The base wheel keeps the rhythm fast, while the fishing bonuses create the show moment. A simple wheel stop turns into a reveal: what fish is coming out, how big it is, what multiplier it carries, and whether extra help is needed to pull it up.

Hapo ndipo mchezo unapata utu wake. Wheel ya msingi huweka rhythm ya haraka, huku bonus za uvuvi zikiunda wakati wa show. Kusimama kwa wheel rahisi hubadilika kuwa ufunuo: samaki gani anatoka, ukubwa wake, multiplier anayobeba, na kama inahitajika msaada wa ziada kumvuta.

Visually, Ice Fishing feels much bigger than a basic wheel game. The scene feels closer to a winter cabin by the lake: cold light, ice around the set, fishing details and a host dressed for the theme. It looks seasonal and polished, but not childish.

Kwa kuona, Ice Fishing inahisi kubwa zaidi kuliko mchezo wa wheel wa msingi. Mandhari inahisi karibu na kibanda cha majira ya baridi kando ya ziwa: mwanga baridi, barafu kuzunguka seti, maelezo ya uvuvi na host aliyevaa kulingana na mandhari. Inaonekana ya msimu na iliyopangwa, lakini si ya watoto.

The camera work is also important. Evolution does not leave the game on one static view. The broadcast can move between the host, the wheel, the betting area, and the bonus reveal. That gives the round more life and makes the player feel like they are watching a real live show rather than a digital result screen.

Kazi ya kamera pia ni muhimu. Evolution haachi mchezo kwenye mtazamo mmoja tuli. Matangazo yanaweza kusonga kati ya host, wheel, eneo la dau, na ufunuo wa bonus. Hiyo huipa raundi uhai zaidi na humfanya mchezaji ahisi anatazama live show halisi badala ya skrini ya matokeo ya kidijitali.

The wheel itself is fully virtual. Unlike physical wheel formats used in some other Evolution games, Ice Fishing uses a digital 53-segment money wheel. Because the wheel is virtual, Evolution can keep the round very fluid. Multipliers appear cleanly, bonus sectors are easy to notice, and the game does not lose speed between spins.

Wheel yenyewe ni virtual kabisa. Tofauti na muundo wa wheel ya kimwili unaotumika katika baadhi ya michezo mingine ya Evolution, Ice Fishing hutumia money wheel ya kidijitali yenye sehemu 53. Kwa sababu wheel ni virtual, Evolution inaweza kuweka raundi iwe laini sana. Multipliers zinaonekana kwa uwazi, sekta za bonus ni rahisi kuona, na mchezo haupotezi kasi kati ya spin.

The overall mood is lighter than many high-energy game shows. Ice Fishing is still quick and active, but the winter setting makes it feel cleaner and more relaxed. Frozen water, fish categories, bonus reveals, and the host's interaction give the game a clear identity inside Evolution's live casino lobby.

Hali ya jumla ni nyepesi kuliko game shows nyingi zenye nishati ya juu. Ice Fishing bado ni ya haraka na hai, lakini mandhari ya majira ya baridi huifanya ihisi safi na tulivu zaidi. Maji yaliyogandishwa, makundi ya samaki, ufunuo wa bonus, na mwingiliano wa host humpa mchezo utambulisho wazi ndani ya lobby ya live casino ya Evolution.
The game gives players a short betting window before each spin. During this time, players can choose between instant payout sectors and bonus options.
Mchezo huwapa wachezaji betting window fupi kabla ya kila spin. Wakati huu, wachezaji wanaweza kuchagua kati ya sekta za malipo ya papo hapo na chaguo za bonus.
The main bet options are:
Chaguo kuu za dau ni:
Lil' Blues
Lil' Blues
Big Oranges
Big Oranges
Huge Reds
Huge Reds
All Bonuses
All Bonuses
Leaf 1 and Leaf 2 are the most frequent symbols. They give instant payouts and keep the base game moving quickly.
Leaf 1 na Leaf 2 ndizo alama za mara nyingi zaidi. Hutoa malipo ya papo hapo na huweka mchezo wa msingi uendelee haraka.

The three fish options work differently. They lead to Bonus games, where multipliers are revealed through the fishing scene. Players can also choose All Bonuses if they want to cover every bonus type instead of selecting one fish category.

Chaguo tatu za samaki hufanya kazi tofauti. Zinaelekea kwenye michezo ya Bonus, ambapo multipliers hufunuliwa kupitia mandhari ya uvuvi. Wachezaji pia wanaweza kuchagua All Bonuses ikiwa wanataka kufunika kila aina ya bonus badala ya kuchagua kundi moja la samaki.
After the betting window closes, random multipliers may appear on wheel segments. Leaf segments can receive multipliers and bonus segments can receive boosts as well.
Baada ya betting window kufungwa, multipliers za nasibu zinaweza kuonekana kwenye sehemu za wheel. Sehemu za Leaf zinaweza kupokea multipliers na sehemu za bonus pia zinaweza kupokea boosts.
Then the wheel spins. If the pointer lands on a Leaf segment, the payout is made according to the result and any active multiplier. If the wheel lands on a bonus segment, the fishing round begins.

Kisha wheel inazunguka. Ikiwa pointer itatua kwenye sehemu ya Leaf, malipo hufanywa kulingana na matokeo na multiplier yoyote inayotumika. Ikiwa wheel itatua kwenye sehemu ya bonus, raundi ya uvuvi huanza.

Ice Fishing uses a 53-segment virtual wheel. The wheel is divided between frequent instant payout sectors and rarer bonus entries.
Ice Fishing hutumia virtual wheel yenye sehemu 53. Wheel imegawanywa kati ya sekta za mara kwa mara za malipo ya papo hapo na maingilio adimu ya bonus.
Segment Type
Aina ya Sehemu
Number of Segments
Idadi ya Sehemu
Instant payout
Malipo ya papo hapo
Bonus game
Mchezo wa bonus
The Bonus games are the main reason Ice Fishing feels different from a standard wheel title. Instead of ending the round immediately, the game shifts into a fishing scene.
Michezo ya Bonus ndiyo sababu kuu Ice Fishing inahisi tofauti na kichwa cha wheel cha kawaida. Badala ya kumaliza raundi mara moja, mchezo hubadilika kwenye mandhari ya uvuvi.
In the bonus round, the result is revealed through the catch. The host reels it in slowly, the fish appears piece by piece, and its multiplier becomes the final payout.
Katika raundi ya bonus, matokeo yanafunuliwa kupitia samaki aliyekamatwa. Host humvuta polepole, samaki anaonekana kidogo kidogo, na multiplier yake huwa malipo ya mwisho.

Lil' Blues is the most frequent bonus type. Multipliers range from 3x to 100x. The fish are smaller, the reveal is usually quicker and the host can handle the catch without much extra help. This bonus feels like the lighter side of Ice Fishing.

Lil' Blues ni aina ya bonus inayotokea mara nyingi zaidi. Multipliers ziko kati ya 3x na 100x. Samaki ni wadogo, ufunuo kwa kawaida ni wa haraka na host anaweza kushughulikia samaki bila msaada mkubwa. Bonus hii inahisi kama upande mwepesi wa Ice Fishing.

Big Oranges sits in the middle. It offers multipliers from 4x to 200x. The fish are larger, the reveal takes more time and the game can bring in extra visual help, such as a crane. This round creates more tension because the potential reward is higher.

Big Oranges iko katikati. Inatoa multipliers kuanzia 4x hadi 200x. Samaki ni wakubwa zaidi, ufunuo huchukua muda zaidi na mchezo unaweza kuleta msaada wa ziada wa kuona, kama vile crane. Raundi hii huunda mvutano zaidi kwa sababu thawabu inayowezekana ni kubwa zaidi.

Huge Reds is the rarest bonus and the one most players will watch closely. There is only one Huge Reds sector on the wheel, and the multiplier range goes from 10x to 500x. This is where the show becomes more dramatic. The fish can be so large that the host may need serious help to pull it out.

Huge Reds ni bonus adimu zaidi na ndiyo wachezaji wengi watazamapo kwa makini. Kuna sekta moja tu ya Huge Reds kwenye wheel, na masafa ya multiplier ni kuanzia 10x hadi 500x. Hapa ndipo show inapokuwa ya kusisimua zaidi. Samaki anaweza kuwa mkubwa sana kiasi kwamba host anaweza kuhitaji msaada mkubwa kumvuta.
Multipliers are added before the wheel spin. This gives every round a little extra movement because some segments can become much more valuable before the result is decided.
Multipliers huongezwa kabla ya wheel kuzunguka. Hii huipa kila raundi mwendo kidogo wa ziada kwa sababu baadhi ya sehemu zinaweza kuwa na thamani kubwa zaidi kabla ya matokeo kuamuliwa.
Leaf multipliers can increase instant payouts. Bonus multipliers are more powerful because they can boost the values inside the fishing round.
Multipliers za Leaf zinaweza kuongeza malipo ya papo hapo. Multipliers za bonus ni zenye nguvu zaidi kwa sababu zinaweza kuongeza thamani ndani ya raundi ya uvuvi.
For example, if a Bonus segment receives a multiplier before the spin, the fish values in that Bonus game can be increased. This is what creates the biggest payout potential in Ice Fishing.

Kwa mfano, ikiwa sehemu ya Bonus itapokea multiplier kabla ya spin, thamani za samaki katika mchezo huo wa Bonus zinaweza kuongezwa. Hii ndiyo inayounda uwezo mkubwa zaidi wa malipo katika Ice Fishing.
The multiplier system works well because it does not slow the game down. The boosts appear quickly, the wheel spins, and the player immediately sees whether the enhanced sector matters.
Mfumo wa multiplier unafanya kazi vizuri kwa sababu hauzuii mchezo. Boosts zinaonekana haraka, wheel inazunguka, na mchezaji anaona mara moja kama sehemu iliyoimarishwa ina maana.
One of the biggest advantages of Ice Fishing is the live host. This is where Evolution's experience in game shows becomes clear.
Mojawapo ya faida kubwa za Ice Fishing ni live host. Hapa uzoefu wa Evolution katika game shows unakuwa wazi.

The host is part of the pace, not just a person standing next to the wheel. They move the round forward, add small comments during the bonuses, and react when the catch turns into something bigger than expected.
Host ni sehemu ya kasi, si mtu tu anayesimama karibu na wheel. Huendeleza raundi, huongeza maoni madogo wakati wa bonus, na huitikia samaki anapokuwa mkubwa kuliko ilivyotarajiwa.
The chat also adds a social layer. Players can follow reactions from others, watch big bonus rounds together, and feel part of a live table rather than playing alone against a screen.

Chat pia huongeza tabaka la kijamii. Wachezaji wanaweza kufuatilia majibu ya wengine, kutazama raundi kubwa za bonus pamoja, na kuhisi kuwa sehemu ya meza ya live badala ya kucheza peke yao dhidi ya skrini.
This is one of the main differences between Ice Fishing and digital instant games. In an instant game, the result belongs only to the player. In Ice Fishing, the round feels shared.
Hii ni moja ya tofauti kuu kati ya Ice Fishing na michezo ya papo hapo ya kidijitali. Katika mchezo wa papo hapo, matokeo ni ya mchezaji pekee. Katika Ice Fishing, raundi inahisi ya pamoja.
Ice Fishing also supports Autoplay in many regions, although it is not available for players from the United Kingdom.
Ice Fishing pia inaunga mkono Autoplay katika maeneo mengi, ingawa haipatikani kwa wachezaji kutoka Ufalme wa Muungano.
Autoplay can be useful because rounds are very short. Instead of clicking every 20 seconds, players can set a number of rounds and let the game continue automatically.
Autoplay inaweza kusaidia kwa sababu raundi ni fupi sana. Badala ya kubofya kila sekunde 20, wachezaji wanaweza kuweka idadi ya raundi na kuacha mchezo uendelee kiotomatiki.
This feature is mainly for convenience. It does not change the odds or improve the result. It simply helps players who prefer to watch the game flow without manually placing the same bet every round.
Kipengele hiki ni hasa kwa urahisi. Hakibadilishi odds wala kuboresha matokeo. Husaidia tu wachezaji wanaopendelea kutazama mtiririko wa mchezo bila kuweka dau lile lile kwa mkono kila raundi.
Ice Fishing stands out because it combines three things Evolution does well: fast gameplay, live presentation, and bonus-driven show moments.
Ice Fishing inajitokeza kwa kuunganisha vitu vitatu Evolution inavyofanya vizuri: gameplay ya haraka, uwasilishaji wa live, na wakati wa show unaotegemea bonus.
It is faster than many live casino games. It is easier to understand than most table games. And it has more personality than a basic money wheel.
Ni ya haraka kuliko michezo mingi ya live casino. Ni rahisi kuelewa kuliko michezo mingi ya meza. Na ina utu zaidi kuliko money wheel ya msingi.

The Arctic setting also gives it a different mood. Games like Crazy Time and Funky Time are loud, colorful, and packed with movement. Ice Fishing is still active, but it feels cleaner and more focused.
Mandhari ya Arctic pia huipa hali tofauti. Michezo kama Crazy Time na Funky Time ni kelele, rangi nyingi, na imejaa mwendo. Ice Fishing bado ni hai, lakini inahisi safi na iliyolengwa zaidi.
That makes the game a good fit for players who want a live show but do not want something overwhelming on the screen.
Hiyo huifanya iwe inafaa kwa wachezaji wanaotaka live show lakini hawataki kitu kinachozidi skrini.
Ice Fishing has several strong points:
Ice Fishing ina pointi kadhaa thabiti:
Round speed is a major plus. Around 20 seconds per round makes the game feel very quick, especially compared with slower live tables.
Kasi ya raundi ni faida kubwa. Takriban sekunde 20 kwa kila raundi hufanya mchezo uhisi wa haraka sana, hasa ukilinganisha na meza za live za polepole.
The presentation is another major advantage. Evolution gives the game a proper studio, host, camera work, and bonus animations.
Uwasilishaji ni faida nyingine kubwa. Evolution huipa mchezo studio sahihi, host, kazi ya kamera, na uhuishaji wa bonus.
The RTP on Leaf bets is attractive at 97.10%, which is strong for this type of live game show.
RTP kwenye dau za Leaf ni ya kuvutia kwa 97.10%, jambo lenye nguvu kwa aina hii ya live game show.
The maximum win of 5,000x, with a payout up to €500,000, gives the game enough high-end potential for bigger-reward players.
Ushindi wa juu wa 5,000x, na malipo hadi $500,000, huipa mchezo uwezo wa kutosha wa kiwango cha juu kwa wachezaji wanaotaka thawabu kubwa.
The bonus rounds are memorable. Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, and Huge Reds are easy to separate visually, and each one has a different level of tension.
Raundi za bonus ni za kukumbukwa. Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, na Huge Reds ni rahisi kutenganisha kwa kuona, na kila moja ina kiwango tofauti cha mvutano.
Ice Fishing is not perfect for everyone.
Ice Fishing si kamili kwa kila mtu.
The betting window is short. Eight seconds may feel fast for new players, especially during the first session. It is better to watch a few rounds before betting.
Betting window ni fupi. Sekunde nane zinaweza kuhisi haraka kwa wachezaji wapya, hasa katika kikao cha kwanza. Ni bora kutazama raundi chache kabla ya kuweka dau.
The RTP also changes depending on the bet type. Leaf bets have the strongest RTP, while bonus bets are lower. Huge Reds has the lowest listed RTP among the main options at 95.17%.
RTP pia hubadilika kulingana na aina ya dau. Dau za Leaf zina RTP imara zaidi, huku dau za bonus zikiwa chini. Huge Reds ina RTP iliyoorodheshwa ya chini zaidi kati ya chaguo kuu kwa 95.17%.
Another point is volatility. Bonus rounds can be exciting, but they are less frequent than Leaf results. Players who focus only on Huge Reds may have long dry periods before seeing the rarest bonus.

Jambo lingine ni volatility. Raundi za bonus zinaweza kusisimua, lakini si za mara nyingi kama matokeo ya Leaf. Wachezaji wanaolenga Huge Reds pekee wanaweza kuwa na vipindi ndefu vya ukame kabla ya kuona bonus adimu zaidi.

Ice Fishing by Evolution Gaming is one of the more interesting live game-show releases, because it is not a simple copy of older wheel games. It takes the familiar money-wheel mechanic and turns it into a winter fishing game show.

Ice Fishing na Evolution Gaming ni mojawapo ya matoleo ya kuvutia zaidi ya live game show, kwa sababu si nakala rahisi ya michezo ya wheel ya zamani. Inachukua mechanics ya money wheel inayojulikana na kuigeuza kuwa game show ya uvuvi wa majira ya baridi.
The game is fast, polished, easy and interactive. The host, studio setting, multipliers and fishing bonuses make each round feel more like a live event than a basic game.
Mchezo ni wa haraka, uliopangwa, rahisi na wa mwingiliano. Host, mandhari ya studio, multipliers na bonus za uvuvi hufanya kila raundi ihisi zaidi kama tukio la live kuliko mchezo wa msingi.

It will suit players who want a live casino game with quick rounds, simple bet choices, and bonus potential. Leaf bets offer the cleanest and most frequent action, while Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, and Huge Reds bring the show moments.

Itafaa wachezaji wanaotaka mchezo wa live casino wenye raundi za haraka, chaguo rahisi za dau, na uwezo wa bonus. Dau za Leaf hutoa hatua safi na ya mara nyingi zaidi, huku Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, na Huge Reds zikileta wakati wa show.
The short betting window and lower RTP on bonus bets are worth keeping in mind, but overall Ice Fishing is a strong addition to Evolution's live portfolio.
Betting window fupi na RTP ya chini kwenye dau za bonus inafaa kukumbukwa, lakini kwa ujumla Ice Fishing ni ongezeko imara kwenye portfolio ya live ya Evolution.
What is Ice Fishing by Evolution?
Ice Fishing na Evolution ni nini?
It is a live casino game show from Evolution Gaming with a virtual wheel, live host and fishing bonus rounds.
Ni live casino game show kutoka Evolution Gaming yenye virtual wheel, live host na raundi za bonus za uvuvi.
Is Ice Fishing the same as Ice Fish by InOut?
Je, Ice Fishing ni sawa na Ice Fish na InOut?
No. Ice Fish by InOut is an instant digital game. Ice Fishing by Evolution is a live game show with a host, studio stream, wheel, chat, and real-time rounds.
Hapana. Ice Fish na InOut ni mchezo wa papo hapo wa kidijitali. Ice Fishing na Evolution ni live game show yenye host, studio stream, wheel, chat, na raundi za real-time.
How does Ice Fishing work?
Ice Fishing inafanya kazi vipi?
You place a bet before the timer ends. The virtual wheel spins, and the sector under the pointer decides the result. Leaf sectors pay instantly, while fish sectors open one of the three bonus rounds.
Unaweka dau kabla ya timer kuisha. Virtual wheel inazunguka, na sekta chini ya pointer huamua matokeo. Sekta za Leaf hulipa mara moja, huku sekta za samaki zikifungua moja ya raundi tatu za bonus.
What do the leaf symbols mean?
Alama za leaf zina maana gani?
Leaf 1 and Leaf 2 are the main instant payout sectors. They appear most often on the wheel and pay directly when the wheel lands on them.
Leaf 1 na Leaf 2 ndizo sekta kuu za malipo ya papo hapo. Zinaonekana mara nyingi zaidi kwenye wheel na hulipa moja kwa moja wheel inapotua kwazo.
What bonus games are in Ice Fishing?
Michezo gani ya bonus iko katika Ice Fishing?
There are three bonus rounds: Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, and Huge Reds. Each one has different fish, multiplier ranges, and reward potential.
Kuna raundi tatu za bonus: Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, na Huge Reds. Kila moja ina samaki tofauti, masafa ya multiplier, na uwezo wa thawabu.
Which Ice Fishing bonus has the biggest multipliers?
Bonus gani ya Ice Fishing ina multipliers kubwa zaidi?
Huge Reds has the highest potential. It is the rarest bonus sector on the wheel and can lead to the biggest multiplier values.
Huge Reds ina uwezo wa juu zaidi. Ni sekta adimu zaidi ya bonus kwenye wheel na inaweza kusababisha thamani kubwa zaidi za multiplier.
Does Ice Fishing have multipliers?
Je, Ice Fishing ina multipliers?
Yes. Before the wheel spins, random sectors can receive extra multipliers that boost Leaf payouts or bonus-round values.
Ndiyo. Kabla ya wheel kuzunguka, sekta za nasibu zinaweza kupokea multipliers za ziada zinazoongeza malipo ya Leaf au thamani za raundi ya bonus.
How long is one round?
Raundi moja huchukua muda gani?
One Ice Fishing round is very short, around 20 seconds. The betting window is also quick, so new players should watch a few rounds before joining.
Raundi moja ya Ice Fishing ni fupi sana, takriban sekunde 20. Betting window pia ni ya haraka, hivyo wachezaji wapya wanapaswa kutazama raundi chache kabla ya kujiunga.
Can I play Ice Fishing on mobile?
Naweza kucheza Ice Fishing kwenye simu?
Yes. Ice Fishing works on mobile and desktop. The stream, wheel, bet spots, and bonus reveal are easy to follow from a phone screen.
Ndiyo. Ice Fishing inafanya kazi kwenye simu na desktop. Stream, wheel, maeneo ya dau, na ufunuo wa bonus ni rahisi kufuatilia kwenye skrini ya simu.
Does Ice Fishing have demo mode?
Je, Ice Fishing ina demo mode?
The live Evolution version usually does not work like a normal demo because it depends on a real studio stream. To practice the basic idea, watch rounds first or try Ice Fish Demo.
Toleo la live la Evolution kwa kawaida halifanyi kazi kama demo ya kawaida kwa sababu linategemea studio stream halisi. Ili kujaribu wazo la msingi, tazama raundi kwanza au jaribu Ice Fish Demo.
What is the RTP of Ice Fishing?
RTP ya Ice Fishing ni nini?
The RTP depends on the bet type. Leaf bets have the highest listed RTP at 97.10%, while bonus bets have lower RTP values.
RTP inategemea aina ya dau. Dau za Leaf zina RTP iliyoorodheshwa ya juu zaidi kwa 97.10%, huku dau za bonus zikiwa na thamani za RTP ya chini.

Je, Ice Fishing ina hatari kwa pesa halisi?

Ice Fishing by Evolution Gaming is not just another wheel game with a winter skin. It is a full live casino show built around speed, presentation, and the small suspense of pulling something unexpected from under the ice.

Ice Fishing na Evolution Gaming si mchezo mwingine wa wheel wenye ganda la baridi tu. Ni live casino show kamili iliyojengwa kwenye kasi, uwasilishaji, na mvutano mdogo wa kuvuta kitu kisichotarajiwa chini ya barafu.

Evolution introduced Ice Fishing at ICE 2025 in Barcelona, and the game immediately stood out because it did not look like another standard wheel release. The theme may overlap with Ice Fish from InOut Games, but the execution is completely different. InOut made a fast digital instant game. Evolution turned the idea into a live studio show with a host, a virtual wheel, short betting windows, and bonus scenes built around the fishing reveal.

Evolution ilizindua Ice Fishing katika ICE 2025 Barcelona, na mchezo ulijitokeza mara moja kwa sababu haukuonekana kama toleo lingine la kawaida la wheel. Mandhari inaweza kufanana na Ice Fish kutoka InOut Games, lakini utekelezaji ni tofauti kabisa. InOut iliunda mchezo wa papo hapo wa kidijitali wa haraka. Evolution iligeuza wazo kuwa live studio show yenye host, virtual wheel, betting window fupi, na mandhari za bonus zinazojengwa kwenye ufunuo wa uvuvi.

The concept fits the current direction of live casino products. Players want games that open quickly, explain themselves visually, and do not take several minutes per round. Evolution built Ice Fishing around that pace.

Dhana inafaa na mwelekeo wa sasa wa bidhaa za live casino. Wachezaji wanataka michezo inayofunguka haraka, inajieleza kwa kuona, na haichukui dakika kadhaa kwa kila raundi. Evolution ilijenga Ice Fishing kwenye kasi hiyo.
Each round lasts around 20 seconds, including an 8-second betting window, which makes the game one of the faster titles in the provider's live game-show lineup.

Kila raundi hudumu takriban sekunde 20, ikiwa ni pamoja na betting window ya sekunde 8, jambo linaloufanya mchezo kuwa mojawapo ya majina ya haraka zaidi katika orodha ya live game show ya mtoa huduma.

Ice Fishing is built around a virtual money wheel with instant payout sectors and three different Bonus games. The player places a bet before the round starts, the wheel spins, and the sector under the pointer decides what happens next.

Ice Fishing imejengwa kwenye virtual money wheel yenye sekta za malipo ya papo hapo na michezo mitatu tofauti ya Bonus. Mchezaji huweka dau kabla ya raundi kuanza, wheel inazunguka, na sekta chini ya pointer huamua kinachofuata.

If the wheel lands on Leaf 1 or Leaf 2, the result is settled immediately. If it lands on one of the fish bonus sectors — Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, or Huge Reds — the game moves into an Arctic fishing scene where the host tries to pull a fish from under the ice.

Ikiwa wheel itatua kwenye Leaf 1 au Leaf 2, matokeo hutatuliwa mara moja. Ikiwa itatua kwenye moja ya sekta za bonus za samaki — Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, au Huge Reds — mchezo huenda kwenye mandhari ya uvuvi ya Arctic ambapo host anajaribu kuvuta samaki chini ya barafu.

That is where the game gets its personality. The base wheel keeps the rhythm fast, while the fishing bonuses create the show moment. A simple wheel stop turns into a reveal: what fish is coming out, how big it is, what multiplier it carries, and whether extra help is needed to pull it up.

Hapo ndipo mchezo unapata utu wake. Wheel ya msingi huweka rhythm ya haraka, huku bonus za uvuvi zikiunda wakati wa show. Kusimama kwa wheel rahisi hubadilika kuwa ufunuo: samaki gani anatoka, ukubwa wake, multiplier anayobeba, na kama inahitajika msaada wa ziada kumvuta.

Visually, Ice Fishing feels much bigger than a basic wheel game. The scene feels closer to a winter cabin by the lake: cold light, ice around the set, fishing details and a host dressed for the theme. It looks seasonal and polished, but not childish.

Kwa kuona, Ice Fishing inahisi kubwa zaidi kuliko mchezo wa wheel wa msingi. Mandhari inahisi karibu na kibanda cha majira ya baridi kando ya ziwa: mwanga baridi, barafu kuzunguka seti, maelezo ya uvuvi na host aliyevaa kulingana na mandhari. Inaonekana ya msimu na iliyopangwa, lakini si ya watoto.

The camera work is also important. Evolution does not leave the game on one static view. The broadcast can move between the host, the wheel, the betting area, and the bonus reveal. That gives the round more life and makes the player feel like they are watching a real live show rather than a digital result screen.

Kazi ya kamera pia ni muhimu. Evolution haachi mchezo kwenye mtazamo mmoja tuli. Matangazo yanaweza kusonga kati ya host, wheel, eneo la dau, na ufunuo wa bonus. Hiyo huipa raundi uhai zaidi na humfanya mchezaji ahisi anatazama live show halisi badala ya skrini ya matokeo ya kidijitali.

The wheel itself is fully virtual. Unlike physical wheel formats used in some other Evolution games, Ice Fishing uses a digital 53-segment money wheel. Because the wheel is virtual, Evolution can keep the round very fluid. Multipliers appear cleanly, bonus sectors are easy to notice, and the game does not lose speed between spins.

Wheel yenyewe ni virtual kabisa. Tofauti na muundo wa wheel ya kimwili unaotumika katika baadhi ya michezo mingine ya Evolution, Ice Fishing hutumia money wheel ya kidijitali yenye sehemu 53. Kwa sababu wheel ni virtual, Evolution inaweza kuweka raundi iwe laini sana. Multipliers zinaonekana kwa uwazi, sekta za bonus ni rahisi kuona, na mchezo haupotezi kasi kati ya spin.

The overall mood is lighter than many high-energy game shows. Ice Fishing is still quick and active, but the winter setting makes it feel cleaner and more relaxed. Frozen water, fish categories, bonus reveals, and the host's interaction give the game a clear identity inside Evolution's live casino lobby.

Hali ya jumla ni nyepesi kuliko game shows nyingi zenye nishati ya juu. Ice Fishing bado ni ya haraka na hai, lakini mandhari ya majira ya baridi huifanya ihisi safi na tulivu zaidi. Maji yaliyogandishwa, makundi ya samaki, ufunuo wa bonus, na mwingiliano wa host humpa mchezo utambulisho wazi ndani ya lobby ya live casino ya Evolution.
The game gives players a short betting window before each spin. During this time, players can choose between instant payout sectors and bonus options.
Mchezo huwapa wachezaji betting window fupi kabla ya kila spin. Wakati huu, wachezaji wanaweza kuchagua kati ya sekta za malipo ya papo hapo na chaguo za bonus.
The main bet options are:
Chaguo kuu za dau ni:
Lil' Blues
Lil' Blues
Big Oranges
Big Oranges
Huge Reds
Huge Reds
All Bonuses
All Bonuses
Leaf 1 and Leaf 2 are the most frequent symbols. They give instant payouts and keep the base game moving quickly.
Leaf 1 na Leaf 2 ndizo alama za mara nyingi zaidi. Hutoa malipo ya papo hapo na huweka mchezo wa msingi uendelee haraka.

The three fish options work differently. They lead to Bonus games, where multipliers are revealed through the fishing scene. Players can also choose All Bonuses if they want to cover every bonus type instead of selecting one fish category.

Chaguo tatu za samaki hufanya kazi tofauti. Zinaelekea kwenye michezo ya Bonus, ambapo multipliers hufunuliwa kupitia mandhari ya uvuvi. Wachezaji pia wanaweza kuchagua All Bonuses ikiwa wanataka kufunika kila aina ya bonus badala ya kuchagua kundi moja la samaki.
After the betting window closes, random multipliers may appear on wheel segments. Leaf segments can receive multipliers and bonus segments can receive boosts as well.
Baada ya betting window kufungwa, multipliers za nasibu zinaweza kuonekana kwenye sehemu za wheel. Sehemu za Leaf zinaweza kupokea multipliers na sehemu za bonus pia zinaweza kupokea boosts.
Then the wheel spins. If the pointer lands on a Leaf segment, the payout is made according to the result and any active multiplier. If the wheel lands on a bonus segment, the fishing round begins.

Kisha wheel inazunguka. Ikiwa pointer itatua kwenye sehemu ya Leaf, malipo hufanywa kulingana na matokeo na multiplier yoyote inayotumika. Ikiwa wheel itatua kwenye sehemu ya bonus, raundi ya uvuvi huanza.

The Bonus games are the main reason Ice Fishing feels different from a standard wheel title. Instead of ending the round immediately, the game shifts into a fishing scene.
Michezo ya Bonus ndiyo sababu kuu Ice Fishing inahisi tofauti na kichwa cha wheel cha kawaida. Badala ya kumaliza raundi mara moja, mchezo hubadilika kwenye mandhari ya uvuvi.
In the bonus round, the result is revealed through the catch. The host reels it in slowly, the fish appears piece by piece, and its multiplier becomes the final payout.
Katika raundi ya bonus, matokeo yanafunuliwa kupitia samaki aliyekamatwa. Host humvuta polepole, samaki anaonekana kidogo kidogo, na multiplier yake huwa malipo ya mwisho.

Lil' Blues is the most frequent bonus type. Multipliers range from 3x to 100x. The fish are smaller, the reveal is usually quicker and the host can handle the catch without much extra help. This bonus feels like the lighter side of Ice Fishing.

Lil' Blues ni aina ya bonus inayotokea mara nyingi zaidi. Multipliers ziko kati ya 3x na 100x. Samaki ni wadogo, ufunuo kwa kawaida ni wa haraka na host anaweza kushughulikia samaki bila msaada mkubwa. Bonus hii inahisi kama upande mwepesi wa Ice Fishing.

Big Oranges sits in the middle. It offers multipliers from 4x to 200x. The fish are larger, the reveal takes more time and the game can bring in extra visual help, such as a crane. This round creates more tension because the potential reward is higher.

Big Oranges iko katikati. Inatoa multipliers kuanzia 4x hadi 200x. Samaki ni wakubwa zaidi, ufunuo huchukua muda zaidi na mchezo unaweza kuleta msaada wa ziada wa kuona, kama vile crane. Raundi hii huunda mvutano zaidi kwa sababu thawabu inayowezekana ni kubwa zaidi.

Huge Reds is the rarest bonus and the one most players will watch closely. There is only one Huge Reds sector on the wheel, and the multiplier range goes from 10x to 500x. This is where the show becomes more dramatic. The fish can be so large that the host may need serious help to pull it out.

Huge Reds ni bonus adimu zaidi na ndiyo wachezaji wengi watazamapo kwa makini. Kuna sekta moja tu ya Huge Reds kwenye wheel, na masafa ya multiplier ni kuanzia 10x hadi 500x. Hapa ndipo show inapokuwa ya kusisimua zaidi. Samaki anaweza kuwa mkubwa sana kiasi kwamba host anaweza kuhitaji msaada mkubwa kumvuta.
Multipliers are added before the wheel spin. This gives every round a little extra movement because some segments can become much more valuable before the result is decided.
Multipliers huongezwa kabla ya wheel kuzunguka. Hii huipa kila raundi mwendo kidogo wa ziada kwa sababu baadhi ya sehemu zinaweza kuwa na thamani kubwa zaidi kabla ya matokeo kuamuliwa.
Leaf multipliers can increase instant payouts. Bonus multipliers are more powerful because they can boost the values inside the fishing round.
Multipliers za Leaf zinaweza kuongeza malipo ya papo hapo. Multipliers za bonus ni zenye nguvu zaidi kwa sababu zinaweza kuongeza thamani ndani ya raundi ya uvuvi.
For example, if a Bonus segment receives a multiplier before the spin, the fish values in that Bonus game can be increased. This is what creates the biggest payout potential in Ice Fishing.

Kwa mfano, ikiwa sehemu ya Bonus itapokea multiplier kabla ya spin, thamani za samaki katika mchezo huo wa Bonus zinaweza kuongezwa. Hii ndiyo inayounda uwezo mkubwa zaidi wa malipo katika Ice Fishing.
The multiplier system works well because it does not slow the game down. The boosts appear quickly, the wheel spins, and the player immediately sees whether the enhanced sector matters.
Mfumo wa multiplier unafanya kazi vizuri kwa sababu hauzuii mchezo. Boosts zinaonekana haraka, wheel inazunguka, na mchezaji anaona mara moja kama sehemu iliyoimarishwa ina maana.
One of the biggest advantages of Ice Fishing is the live host. This is where Evolution's experience in game shows becomes clear.
Mojawapo ya faida kubwa za Ice Fishing ni live host. Hapa uzoefu wa Evolution katika game shows unakuwa wazi.

The host is part of the pace, not just a person standing next to the wheel. They move the round forward, add small comments during the bonuses, and react when the catch turns into something bigger than expected.
Host ni sehemu ya kasi, si mtu tu anayesimama karibu na wheel. Huendeleza raundi, huongeza maoni madogo wakati wa bonus, na huitikia samaki anapokuwa mkubwa kuliko ilivyotarajiwa.
The chat also adds a social layer. Players can follow reactions from others, watch big bonus rounds together, and feel part of a live table rather than playing alone against a screen.

Chat pia huongeza tabaka la kijamii. Wachezaji wanaweza kufuatilia majibu ya wengine, kutazama raundi kubwa za bonus pamoja, na kuhisi kuwa sehemu ya meza ya live badala ya kucheza peke yao dhidi ya skrini.
This is one of the main differences between Ice Fishing and digital instant games. In an instant game, the result belongs only to the player. In Ice Fishing, the round feels shared.
Hii ni moja ya tofauti kuu kati ya Ice Fishing na michezo ya papo hapo ya kidijitali. Katika mchezo wa papo hapo, matokeo ni ya mchezaji pekee. Katika Ice Fishing, raundi inahisi ya pamoja.
Ice Fishing also supports Autoplay in many regions, although it is not available for players from the United Kingdom.
Ice Fishing pia inaunga mkono Autoplay katika maeneo mengi, ingawa haipatikani kwa wachezaji kutoka Ufalme wa Muungano.
Autoplay can be useful because rounds are very short. Instead of clicking every 20 seconds, players can set a number of rounds and let the game continue automatically.
Autoplay inaweza kusaidia kwa sababu raundi ni fupi sana. Badala ya kubofya kila sekunde 20, wachezaji wanaweza kuweka idadi ya raundi na kuacha mchezo uendelee kiotomatiki.
This feature is mainly for convenience. It does not change the odds or improve the result. It simply helps players who prefer to watch the game flow without manually placing the same bet every round.
Kipengele hiki ni hasa kwa urahisi. Hakibadilishi odds wala kuboresha matokeo. Husaidia tu wachezaji wanaopendelea kutazama mtiririko wa mchezo bila kuweka dau lile lile kwa mkono kila raundi.
Ice Fishing stands out because it combines three things Evolution does well: fast gameplay, live presentation, and bonus-driven show moments.
Ice Fishing inajitokeza kwa kuunganisha vitu vitatu Evolution inavyofanya vizuri: gameplay ya haraka, uwasilishaji wa live, na wakati wa show unaotegemea bonus.
It is faster than many live casino games. It is easier to understand than most table games. And it has more personality than a basic money wheel.
Ni ya haraka kuliko michezo mingi ya live casino. Ni rahisi kuelewa kuliko michezo mingi ya meza. Na ina utu zaidi kuliko money wheel ya msingi.

The Arctic setting also gives it a different mood. Games like Crazy Time and Funky Time are loud, colorful, and packed with movement. Ice Fishing is still active, but it feels cleaner and more focused.
Mandhari ya Arctic pia huipa hali tofauti. Michezo kama Crazy Time na Funky Time ni kelele, rangi nyingi, na imejaa mwendo. Ice Fishing bado ni hai, lakini inahisi safi na iliyolengwa zaidi.
That makes the game a good fit for players who want a live show but do not want something overwhelming on the screen.
Hiyo huifanya iwe inafaa kwa wachezaji wanaotaka live show lakini hawataki kitu kinachozidi skrini.
Ice Fishing has several strong points:
Ice Fishing ina pointi kadhaa thabiti:
Round speed is a major plus. Around 20 seconds per round makes the game feel very quick, especially compared with slower live tables.
Kasi ya raundi ni faida kubwa. Takriban sekunde 20 kwa kila raundi hufanya mchezo uhisi wa haraka sana, hasa ukilinganisha na meza za live za polepole.
The presentation is another major advantage. Evolution gives the game a proper studio, host, camera work, and bonus animations.
Uwasilishaji ni faida nyingine kubwa. Evolution huipa mchezo studio sahihi, host, kazi ya kamera, na uhuishaji wa bonus.
The RTP on Leaf bets is attractive at 97.10%, which is strong for this type of live game show.
RTP kwenye dau za Leaf ni ya kuvutia kwa 97.10%, jambo lenye nguvu kwa aina hii ya live game show.
The maximum win of 5,000x, with a payout up to €500,000, gives the game enough high-end potential for bigger-reward players.
Ushindi wa juu wa 5,000x, na malipo hadi $500,000, huipa mchezo uwezo wa kutosha wa kiwango cha juu kwa wachezaji wanaotaka thawabu kubwa.
The bonus rounds are memorable. Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, and Huge Reds are easy to separate visually, and each one has a different level of tension.
Raundi za bonus ni za kukumbukwa. Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, na Huge Reds ni rahisi kutenganisha kwa kuona, na kila moja ina kiwango tofauti cha mvutano.
Ice Fishing is not perfect for everyone.
Ice Fishing si kamili kwa kila mtu.
The betting window is short. Eight seconds may feel fast for new players, especially during the first session. It is better to watch a few rounds before betting.
Betting window ni fupi. Sekunde nane zinaweza kuhisi haraka kwa wachezaji wapya, hasa katika kikao cha kwanza. Ni bora kutazama raundi chache kabla ya kuweka dau.
The RTP also changes depending on the bet type. Leaf bets have the strongest RTP, while bonus bets are lower. Huge Reds has the lowest listed RTP among the main options at 95.17%.
RTP pia hubadilika kulingana na aina ya dau. Dau za Leaf zina RTP imara zaidi, huku dau za bonus zikiwa chini. Huge Reds ina RTP iliyoorodheshwa ya chini zaidi kati ya chaguo kuu kwa 95.17%.
Another point is volatility. Bonus rounds can be exciting, but they are less frequent than Leaf results. Players who focus only on Huge Reds may have long dry periods before seeing the rarest bonus.

Jambo lingine ni volatility. Raundi za bonus zinaweza kusisimua, lakini si za mara nyingi kama matokeo ya Leaf. Wachezaji wanaolenga Huge Reds pekee wanaweza kuwa na vipindi ndefu vya ukame kabla ya kuona bonus adimu zaidi.

Ice Fishing by Evolution Gaming is one of the more interesting live game-show releases, because it is not a simple copy of older wheel games. It takes the familiar money-wheel mechanic and turns it into a winter fishing game show.

Ice Fishing na Evolution Gaming ni mojawapo ya matoleo ya kuvutia zaidi ya live game show, kwa sababu si nakala rahisi ya michezo ya wheel ya zamani. Inachukua mechanics ya money wheel inayojulikana na kuigeuza kuwa game show ya uvuvi wa majira ya baridi.
The game is fast, polished, easy and interactive. The host, studio setting, multipliers and fishing bonuses make each round feel more like a live event than a basic game.
Mchezo ni wa haraka, uliopangwa, rahisi na wa mwingiliano. Host, mandhari ya studio, multipliers na bonus za uvuvi hufanya kila raundi ihisi zaidi kama tukio la live kuliko mchezo wa msingi.

It will suit players who want a live casino game with quick rounds, simple bet choices, and bonus potential. Leaf bets offer the cleanest and most frequent action, while Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, and Huge Reds bring the show moments.

Itafaa wachezaji wanaotaka mchezo wa live casino wenye raundi za haraka, chaguo rahisi za dau, na uwezo wa bonus. Dau za Leaf hutoa hatua safi na ya mara nyingi zaidi, huku Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, na Huge Reds zikileta wakati wa show.
The short betting window and lower RTP on bonus bets are worth keeping in mind, but overall Ice Fishing is a strong addition to Evolution's live portfolio.
Betting window fupi na RTP ya chini kwenye dau za bonus inafaa kukumbukwa, lakini kwa ujumla Ice Fishing ni ongezeko imara kwenye portfolio ya live ya Evolution.
What is Ice Fishing by Evolution?
Ice Fishing na Evolution ezali nini ?
It is a live casino game show from Evolution Gaming with a virtual wheel, live host and fishing bonus rounds.
Ni live casino game show kutoka Evolution Gaming yenye virtual wheel, live host na raundi za bonus za uvuvi.
Is Ice Fishing the same as Ice Fish by InOut?
Ice Fishing ezali même que Ice Fish na InOut ?
No. Ice Fish by InOut is an instant digital game. Ice Fishing by Evolution is a live game show with a host, studio stream, wheel, chat, and real-time rounds.
Te. Ice Fish na InOut ezali instant digital game. Ice Fishing na Evolution ezali live game show na host, studio stream, roue, chat mpe round ya real-time.
How does Ice Fishing work?
Ice Fishing esalemi ndenge nini ?
You place a bet before the timer ends. The virtual wheel spins, and the sector under the pointer decides the result. Leaf sectors pay instantly, while fish sectors open one of the three bonus rounds.
Unaweka dau kabla ya timer kuisha. Virtual wheel inazunguka, na sekta chini ya pointer huamua matokeo. Sekta za Leaf hulipa mara moja, huku sekta za samaki zikifungua moja ya raundi tatu za bonus.
What do the leaf symbols mean?
Ba symbole leaf elobaka nini ?
Leaf 1 and Leaf 2 are the main instant payout sectors. They appear most often on the wheel and pay directly when the wheel lands on them.
Leaf 1 na Leaf 2 ndizo sekta kuu za malipo ya papo hapo. Zinaonekana mara nyingi zaidi kwenye wheel na hulipa moja kwa moja wheel inapotua kwazo.
What bonus games are in Ice Fishing?
Ba bonus game nini ezali na Ice Fishing ?
There are three bonus rounds: Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, and Huge Reds. Each one has different fish, multiplier ranges, and reward potential.
Kuna raundi tatu za bonus: Lil' Blues, Big Oranges, na Huge Reds. Kila moja ina samaki tofauti, masafa ya multiplier, na uwezo wa thawabu.
Which Ice Fishing bonus has the biggest multipliers?
Bonus nini ya Ice Fishing ezali na multiplier ya likolo ?
Huge Reds has the highest potential. It is the rarest bonus sector on the wheel and can lead to the biggest multiplier values.
Huge Reds ina uwezo wa juu zaidi. Ni sekta adimu zaidi ya bonus kwenye wheel na inaweza kusababisha thamani kubwa zaidi za multiplier.
Does Ice Fishing have multipliers?
Ice Fishing ezali na multiplier ?
Yes. Before the wheel spins, random sectors can receive extra multipliers that boost Leaf payouts or bonus-round values.
Ee. Liboso ya roue e tourner, ba secteur aléatoire ekoki kozwa multiplier ya likolo oyo e boosti paiement Leaf to valeur ya bonus round.
How long is one round?
Round moko e durer ntango boni ?
One Ice Fishing round is very short, around 20 seconds. The betting window is also quick, so new players should watch a few rounds before joining.
Raundi moja ya Ice Fishing ni fupi sana, takriban sekunde 20. Betting window pia ni ya haraka, hivyo wachezaji wapya wanapaswa kutazama raundi chache kabla ya kujiunga.
Can I play Ice Fishing on mobile?
Nakoki kobeta Ice Fishing na mobile ?
Yes. Ice Fishing works on mobile and desktop. The stream, wheel, bet spots, and bonus reveal are easy to follow from a phone screen.
Ee. Ice Fishing esalemi na mobile mpe desktop. Stream, roue, ba spot ya pari mpe révélation bonus e followi malamu na écran ya téléphone.
Does Ice Fishing have demo mode?
Ice Fishing ezali na mode démo ?
The live Evolution version usually does not work like a normal demo because it depends on a real studio stream. To practice the basic idea, watch rounds first or try Ice Fish Demo.
Toleo la live la Evolution kwa kawaida halifanyi kazi kama demo ya kawaida kwa sababu linategemea studio stream halisi. Ili kujaribu wazo la msingi, tazama raundi kwanza au jaribu Ice Fish Demo.
What is the RTP of Ice Fishing?
RTP ya Ice Fishing ezali nini ?
The RTP depends on the bet type. Leaf bets have the highest listed RTP at 97.10%, while bonus bets have lower RTP values.

Is Ice Fishing risky with real money?
